title: Capital Float is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Capital Float is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Full Stack Developer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
